overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Ghost of Tsushima showing a samurai character ascending a mountain path through a Japanese shrine area with white cherry blossoms, passing through a torii gate, and approaching a massive red maple tree. The scene features cinematic game engine graphics with dynamic lighting, falling petals, and traditional wooden architecture.

large cherry tree with full white blossom canopy
large cherry tree with full white blossom canopy
wooden construction scaffolding on the hillside

segments.scene_description: The character ascends a stone staircase flanked by dense white cherry blossom trees in full bloom. The path is narrow and enclosed by the canopy overhead, with wooden scaffolding visible on the distant hillside.

scene_state.functional_zone: grassy approach to shrine torii gate

events.description: reaches top of stone stairs and transitions to grassy terrain with scattered rocks
slight turn to align with the torii gate entrance ahead

agents.ego_description: walking along grassy path toward the wooden torii gate

entered.detail: traditional wooden torii gate with curved black roof
traditional Japanese stone lantern (tōrō) with moss
traditional Japanese stone lantern (tōrō) with moss
large boulder covered in vibrant green moss

segments.scene_description: Exiting the staircase, the scene opens into a grassy approach lined with mossy rocks and stone lanterns. The character walks toward a traditional wooden torii gate that marks the shrine entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: fenced shrine corridor with stone lanterns

events.description: passes through wooden torii gate into fenced corridor
massive red maple tree becomes visible at the end of the fenced path

agents.ego_description: walking through torii gate along fenced path lined with stone lanterns

weathered wooden fence posts lining the sacred path

segments.scene_description: Passing through the torii gate, the character enters a narrow fenced corridor lined with stone lanterns. The white cherry trees recede into the background as a massive red maple tree becomes visible at the end of the stone path.

scene_state.functional_zone: sacred grove with massive red maple tree

events.description: exits fenced corridor into open grove with red maple tree
sun creates lens flare through red maple leaves as character approaches

agents.ego_description: walking toward and arriving beneath the massive red maple tree with falling crimson leaves

entered.detail: tall stone monument or stele standing behind the red maple tree

segments.scene_description: The corridor opens into a wide sacred grove where the massive red maple tree dominates the scene. The character approaches the tree as the sun creates a dramatic backlight through the crimson leaves, with a stone monument visible in the background.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that ascends from a secluded cherry blossom grove into a wide, sacred shrine area dominated by a massive red maple. It begins with the character climbing a narrow stone staircase enclosed by a dense canopy of white blossoms and distant hillside scaffolding. As the character exits the stairs, the environment opens into a grassy approach lined with mossy rocks and stone lanterns leading toward a traditional wooden torii gate. Passing through the gate, the scene shifts into a narrow fenced corridor where the white trees recede, gradually revealing a crimson focal point at the end of the path. The corridor finally expands into a wide sacred grove, where the camera approaches the towering red maple tree as dramatic sunlight filters through its leaves to illuminate a distant stone monument.
